use_cases: Displaying social media view counts with decorative flair
Presenting achievement badges or milestone numbers
Adding visual interest to analytics summaries
ai_summary: A decorative card component featuring glowing rays, dots, and border lines that displays a metrics value (750k views). The component uses layered div elements with CSS classes to create a radiant, eye-catching effect suitable for highlighting social proof, analytics data, or achievement statistics in dashboards and landing pages.
